## ✅ Pre-flight checklist

Before filing, please confirm you have checked the [FAQ](../../docs/FAQ.md) for your issue:

      find a duplicate
- [ ] I am using **Node 20 LTS** (`node --version`)
- [ ] My `.env` variables match the network Freighter is connected to
